prophecies.a:
在卡利年代，正法（Dharma）仅存四分之一，且将逐渐衰减至完全消亡。人们将变得不虔诚、不诚实，充满嫉妒与暴力。

白话：在这个最黑暗的时代，道德与正义只剩下四分之一的力量，并且还在不断减少直至消亡。人性将全面堕落。
prophecies.a_en:
In Kali Yuga, Dharma (righteousness) exists only one quarter and gradually diminishes to nothing. People become irreligious, dishonest, filled with envy and violence.

In plain terms: In this darkest age, morality and justice retain only a quarter of their power, continuously diminishing until they vanish. Human nature degenerates completely.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 印度教传统认为当前人类处于卡利年代（始于约公元前3102年）。现代社会中道德争议、暴力冲突与诚信危机的普遍性可被视为与预言描述部分吻合，但"正法四分之一"属宗教宇宙观的隐喻性表述，无法精确量化验证。
prophecies.verdict_en: Hindu tradition holds that humanity is currently in Kali Yuga (beginning c. 3102 BCE). The prevalence of moral controversies, violent conflicts, and trust crises in modern society can be seen as partially matching the prophecy, but 'Dharma at one quarter' is a metaphorical religious cosmological expression that cannot be precisely quantified.

prophecies.q: 卡利年代的堕落征兆：统治者
prophecies.a:
国王将不再保护人民，反而成为掠夺者。统治者将以税收之名搜刮民脂民膏，不再行正义之事。他们将是性格暴躁、行事残忍的人。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2

白话：统治者将从人民的守护者堕落为压迫者，贪婪地榨取民众财富，施行暴政。
prophecies.q_en: Signs of Kali Yuga's degeneration: Rulers
prophecies.a_en:
Kings will no longer protect the people but become plunderers. Rulers will extract the wealth of citizens under the guise of taxation, no longer upholding justice. They will be irascible and cruel in nature.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2

In plain terms: Rulers will degenerate from protectors of the people into oppressors, greedily extracting citizens' wealth and ruling through tyranny.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 历史上暴政与腐败统治屡见不鲜，从古罗马到现代独裁政权。透明国际腐败感知指数显示全球仍有大量国家存在严重腐败。但同时民主制度、法治与人权保障也在许多国家取得进步，预言的绝对化描述仅部分符合现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: Tyranny and corrupt rule have recurred throughout history, from ancient Rome to modern authoritarian regimes. Transparency International's CPI shows widespread corruption persists globally. However, democratic institutions, rule of law, and human rights have also advanced in many nations, so the prophecy's absolutist description only partially matches reality.

prophecies.q: 卡利年代的堕落征兆：社会与道德
prophecies.a:
人们的寿命将缩短，体力和记忆力都将衰退。婚姻将仅基于口头约定，言语将取代行动。外貌将成为评判一个人价值的唯一标准。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2

白话：人类的身体素质和精神品质将全面退化。社会将变得肤浅，注重表面而忽视内在。
prophecies.q_en: Signs of Kali Yuga's degeneration: Society and morality
prophecies.a_en:
People's lifespan will shorten, and strength and memory will decline. Marriage will be based on mere verbal agreements. Words will replace actions. Appearance will be the sole criterion for judging a person's worth.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2

In plain terms: Human physical and mental qualities will universally degenerate. Society will become superficial, valuing appearances over substance.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代社会中"外貌至上"的文化（社交媒体、整容产业）和婚姻制度的变化（离婚率上升、非正式同居增加）可被视为与部分描述吻合。但人类平均寿命实际上在过去几个世纪大幅增长（WHO数据显示全球平均寿命从1950年的47岁增至2023年的73岁），与"寿命缩短"的预言相反。
prophecies.verdict_en: Modern 'appearance-obsessed' culture (social media, cosmetic surgery industry) and changes in marriage (rising divorce rates, increasing cohabitation) can be seen as matching parts of this description. However, human life expectancy has actually increased dramatically over recent centuries (WHO data shows global average rising from 47 years in 1950 to 73 in 2023), contradicting the 'shortened lifespan' prediction.

prophecies.q: 卡利年代的堕落征兆：财富与宗教
prophecies.a:
财富将成为衡量一个人出身、行为正当性和品德的唯一标准。法律与正义将仅以权力为依据。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2

白话：金钱将取代一切道德标准，成为社会的唯一通行证。法律将沦为权贵的工具。
prophecies.q_en: Signs of Kali Yuga's degeneration: Wealth and religion
prophecies.a_en:
Wealth alone will be the criterion for determining a person's birth, proper conduct, and qualities. Law and justice will be based solely on power.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2

In plain terms: Money will replace all moral standards, becoming society's sole currency. Law will become a tool of the powerful.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球贫富分化加剧（乐施会2024年报告显示全球最富1%拥有近一半全球财富）与"金钱至上"文化的盛行可被视为与预言吻合。但公益慈善、社会福利制度和反腐法律的发展也在对抗这一趋势，预言的绝对化描述仅部分符合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Widening global wealth inequality (Oxfam 2024 report shows the richest 1% own nearly half of global wealth) and the prevalence of materialistic culture can be seen as matching the prophecy. However, philanthropy, social welfare systems, and anti-corruption laws also counter this trend, so the absolutist prediction only partially matches.

prophecies.q: 卡利年代的堕落征兆：自然环境
prophecies.a:
大地将不再丰产，雨水将不按时节降落。牛只将变得瘦弱如山羊，不再产奶。树木将矮化为灌木，云将降下闪电而非甘霖。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2

白话：自然环境将全面恶化，农业衰败，气候异常，动植物退化。
prophecies.q_en: Signs of Kali Yuga's degeneration: Natural environment
prophecies.a_en:
The earth will no longer be fertile, and rain will not fall in due season. Cows will become thin like goats and cease to give milk. Trees will be reduced to bushes, and clouds will bring lightning instead of rain.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2

In plain terms: The natural environment will deteriorate universally — agriculture declines, climate becomes erratic, and flora and fauna degenerate.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 气候变化导致的极端天气、干旱频发与农业挑战（IPCC第六次评估报告）可被视为与"雨水不按时节""大地不再丰产"部分吻合。但现代农业技术使全球粮食产量总体上大幅增长，"不再丰产"的描述过于绝对。森林退化和物种减少（WWF《地球生命力报告》）则与"树木矮化"的隐喻有一定对应。
prophecies.verdict_en: Climate change causing extreme weather, frequent droughts, and agricultural challenges (IPCC Sixth Assessment Report) can be seen as partially matching 'rain not falling in season' and 'earth no longer fertile'. However, modern agricultural technology has vastly increased global food production overall. Deforestation and species decline (WWF Living Planet Report) do correspond metaphorically to 'trees reduced to bushes'.

prophecies.q: 卡尔基的出生地与家世
prophecies.a:
毗湿奴将以卡尔基之名降生于香巴拉（Shambhala）村，父亲名为毗湿奴耶舍（Vishnuyasha），是一位博学的婆罗门。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2.18

白话：卡尔基将诞生在一个名叫香巴拉的地方，出身于一个虔诚的婆罗门家庭，父亲是一位学识渊博的祭司。
prophecies.a_en:
Vishnu will incarnate as Kalki in the village of Shambhala, born to a learned Brahmin named Vishnuyasha.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2.18

In plain terms: Kalki will be born in a place called Shambhala, into a devout Brahmin family, to a father who is a learned priest.

prophecies.a:
在卡利年代的终末，当国王们已沦为盗贼，卡尔基——毗湿奴之主——将降世。他将消灭一切蛮族和堕落之辈，重新建立正法。
——《毗湿奴往世书》4.24

白话：当统治者彻底堕落为掠夺者时，毗湿奴将化身卡尔基降临人间，扫除一切邪恶力量，重建正义与秩序。
prophecies.a_en:
At the end of Kali Yuga, when kings have degenerated into thieves, Lord Vishnu will incarnate as Kalki. He will destroy all barbarians and degraded beings, and re-establish Dharma.
— Vishnu Purana 4.24

In plain terms: When rulers have completely degenerated into plunderers, Vishnu will incarnate as Kalki to sweep away all evil forces and restore righteousness and order.

prophecies.a:
卡尔基将骑上一匹名为德瓦达塔（Devadatta）的白马，手持燃烧如火的利剑，以无人能敌的速度驰骋大地，消灭数以百万计伪装成国王的盗贼。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2.19-20

白话：卡尔基将骑着神圣的白马，手持神剑，横扫天下，消灭所有伪善的暴君。
prophecies.q_en: The white horse and divine sword
prophecies.a_en:
Kalki will mount a white horse named Devadatta, wielding a blazing sword, and traverse the earth at unmatched speed, destroying millions of thieves disguised as kings.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2.19-20

In plain terms: Kalki will ride the sacred white horse, wielding a divine sword, sweeping across the world to destroy all hypocritical tyrants.

prophecies.a:
卡尔基将率领大军与邪恶之王作战。他将击败佛陀的敌人（即不义之人），摧毁所有蛮族的城市和要塞。这场战争将持续多年，直至正法完全恢复。
——《卡尔基往世书》

白话：卡尔基将领导一场终极之战，彻底击败所有邪恶势力，摧毁他们的据点，直到正义完全重建。
prophecies.a_en:
Kalki will lead a great army against the kings of evil. He will defeat the enemies of righteousness and destroy all barbarian cities and fortresses. This war will last for years until Dharma is fully restored.
— Kalki Purana

In plain terms: Kalki will lead an ultimate war, completely defeating all evil forces, destroying their strongholds, until justice is fully re-established.

prophecies.a:
卡尔基将消灭一切Mleccha（不遵正法之人），并使世界得到净化。如同烈火焚烧枯木，不留任何邪恶的种子。大地将如同被雨水洗涤后重新焕发生机。
——《卡尔基往世书》

白话：卡尔基将彻底清除世间一切不义，净化整个世界。如同大火烧尽枯枝败叶，大地将焕然一新。
prophecies.a_en:
Kalki will destroy all Mlecchas (those who do not follow Dharma) and purify the world. Like fire burning dry wood, no seed of evil shall remain. The earth will regain its vitality as if washed by rain.
— Kalki Purana

In plain terms: Kalki will completely eradicate all unrighteousness and purify the entire world. Like fire consuming dead branches, the earth will be renewed.

prophecies.a:
当毗湿奴以卡尔基之形回归天界之后，黄金时代（Satya Yuga/Krita Yuga）将再次开始。人们的心灵将被唤醒，如同从长眠中苏醒。
——《薄伽梵往世书》12.2.23

白话：在卡尔基完成使命后，一个全新的黄金时代将降临。人类将重获智慧与善良，仿佛从沉睡中觉醒。
prophecies.q_en: The return of the Golden Age
prophecies.a_en:
After Vishnu in the form of Kalki returns to heaven, the Golden Age (Satya Yuga/Krita Yuga) will begin anew. People's minds will be awakened, as if roused from a long slumber.
— Bhagavata Purana 12.2.23

In plain terms: After Kalki completes his mission, a new Golden Age will dawn. Humanity will regain wisdom and virtue, as if awakening from deep sleep.

prophecies.a:
宇宙以四个时代为一个周期不断循环：Satya Yuga（黄金时代，1,728,000年）、Treta Yuga（白银时代，1,296,000年）、Dvapara Yuga（青铜时代，864,000年）、Kali Yuga（黑铁时代，432,000年）。合共432万年为一个大循环（Mahayuga）。
——《摩诃婆罗多》《摩奴法典》

白话：宇宙的时间以四个时代为一轮循环，每轮总计432万年。黄金时代最长最美好，黑铁时代最短最黑暗，周而复始。
prophecies.q_en: The cycle of four cosmic ages
prophecies.a_en:
The universe cycles through four ages: Satya Yuga (Golden Age, 1,728,000 years), Treta Yuga (Silver Age, 1,296,000 years), Dvapara Yuga (Bronze Age, 864,000 years), Kali Yuga (Iron Age, 432,000 years). Together they form one Mahayuga of 4,320,000 years.
— Mahabharata, Manusmriti

In plain terms: Cosmic time cycles through four ages totaling 4.32 million years. The Golden Age is the longest and most virtuous; the Iron Age is the shortest and darkest — and the cycle repeats endlessly.

prophecies.a:
卡利年代的总长度为432,000年。据传统计算，卡利年代始于公元前3102年（对应摩诃婆罗多战争结束、黑天离世之时），将在约公元428,899年结束。
——《苏利耶历算书》

白话：按照传统计算，当前的黑铁时代始于约五千年前，还将持续约四十二万年才会迎来终结和新的黄金时代。
prophecies.a_en:
Kali Yuga lasts 432,000 years in total. According to traditional calculations, it began in 3102 BCE (corresponding to the end of the Mahabharata War and departure of Krishna) and will end around 428,899 CE.
— Surya Siddhanta

In plain terms: According to traditional reckoning, the current Iron Age began about five thousand years ago and will continue for approximately 427,000 more years before its end and the dawn of a new Golden Age.

prophecies.a:
卡尔基将拥有八种超自然能力（Ashta Siddhi）：微身通、轻身通、大身通、随心通、远到通、意志力、控制力与如意通。凭此八种神力，他将无往不胜。
——《卡尔基往世书》

白话：卡尔基将拥有八种神通法力：可以变得极小、极轻、极大，可以心想事成、瞬移任何地方、控制万物，无所不能。
prophecies.a_en:
Kalki will possess eight supernatural powers (Ashta Siddhi): Anima (becoming minute), Laghima (becoming weightless), Mahima (becoming immense), Prapti (obtaining anything), Prakamya (irresistible will), Vashitva (control over all), Ishitva (supremacy), and Kamavasayitva (fulfilling all desires). With these eight powers, he will be invincible.
— Kalki Purana

In plain terms: Kalki will possess eight divine powers: becoming infinitely small, weightless, or immense; obtaining anything desired; teleporting anywhere; controlling all things — making him truly omnipotent.

prophecies.a:
当月亮、太阳与木星同处一宫，推星（Pushya/Tishya）升起之时，即为黄金时代重临之兆。此天象标志着卡利年代的终结与正法的复兴。
——《毗湿奴往世书》4.24

白话：特定的天文现象——月亮、太阳和木星同时出现在同一星宿——将预示着黑暗时代的终结和黄金时代的来临。
prophecies.a_en:
When the Moon, the Sun, and Jupiter are together in one mansion, and the star Pushya (Tishya) rises, it will signal the return of the Golden Age. This celestial alignment marks the end of Kali Yuga and the restoration of Dharma.
— Vishnu Purana 4.24

In plain terms: A specific astronomical event — the Moon, Sun, and Jupiter appearing together in the same constellation — will herald the end of the dark age and the dawn of the Golden Age.
